speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, Nott. That is five points of bludgeoning damage and it is attached to you. You now see a pitch black and gray spined octopus-type creature, that looks from the exterior like any other part of the cavern wall, but has these deep sunk red eyes at the top of its base and it's completely wrapped around the top of Nott, and is currently crushing down on top of her. I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make a general dexterity check for me, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, not good, but it's dexterity, so six?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is fun! Hand me a rope, I'll water ski!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're so entranced by this, you glance down just in time to see one of those stones that's protruding from the river seems to have come out of nowhere. Before you have a minute to punch off, it hits you across the knee and bruises the heck out of it. Your whole leg starts throbbing and you're like, "Ah!" So your skiing is now (crashing splashes) underneath.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll try to pull myself back up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, it takes you a moment and Caleb, you go and help get Nott up onto the boat, but as you do, a little water logged, the water splashed over your face a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus, that's an intense water ski.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because at that moment the lights go out. As soon as you pull Nott up into the ship, there's a brief moment where Nott breathes and looks back up with a smile about to say thank you before you see, out of the corner of your eye, one of the stalagmites at the top of the ceiling detach, float down and open up, almost like an umbrella before it lands and collapses on top of Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) It's just like the rug!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ah! What happened? What's going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With advantage because it was with a surprise attack on that one, so that would be a 19 to hit. What's your armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Of course that hits. Yes.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You watch as another one begins to slowly emerge and another begins to emerge from the ceiling. I need you all roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think I would have noticed that the circus bouncer looking in the urn did not get blown up, but also looked a little puzzled. So I'm going to go over and take a look at the same thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take a look at the other one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you go to look in the other urn, you glance over at the urn that Yasha was turned away from, and you see this glowing fire emerge from the urn in her direction. Just this small, glowing orb begin to shift out of the urn right towards her back.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I ready to fire?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are. You get to make an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start with one of my blades.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'm going to shoot a crossbow bolt at that fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit. And that is a 19 against you Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Wait. Yeah, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, do your damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Is this sneak attack or no? I don't even know what this creature is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yasha is right next to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do I get a saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No saving throw, but you do take 13 points of lightning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to die.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I deal 16 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, do you double it because it's a critical?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The dice are doubled. Not your modifiers, but the dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow. Okay. That's 28 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 28 points of damage. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All the dice are doubled?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Good god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you actually take no damage, because he was holding his reaction and as soon as it emerges, he fires. You watch as the orb dissipates. The faint, little motes of energy shift and vanish on the outside of the urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking at the other urn. Is anything happening?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, going for initiative here folks. 25 to 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking at the other urn. Is anything happening?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as another one begins to slowly emerge and another begins to emerge from the ceiling. I need you all roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Here we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) No time to thank me.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) No! No time!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, really?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got another one for 826LA.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I rolled the same initiative. This is the worst initiative ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You got Yasha off to this side, going this way. Nott, you're not too far from there. Molly, you were off to the opposite side to look to the other edge. Caleb, where were you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I was where Yasha was. I went over to look at her urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right. So you were over by Yasha. Fjord, you were over by where you found the object. Frumpkin was-- ?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin would have been just 15 feet into the chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. And then Beau and Jester, where are you placed?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I would be probably be in between Fjord and Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was wherever those bodies where, because I was kneeling down and looking at them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. So that would be this relief right here, by Fjord's. All righty. And you watch as Molly-- actually Molly was making his way over there as this happened. And that one emerged.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It look like lightning corn on the cob.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Another one shifts out of the urn that you just had one emerge from.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's my own urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That Nott has destroyed. It dissipated, then the small motes (fwoosh) back into the urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! It's like never ending.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Now that I know it's there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's not a surprise, at least.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Not a surprise.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, the will-o'-wisps rolled a 26 for initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) No! No time!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, really?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got another one for 826LA.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I rolled the same initiative. This is the worst initiative ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You got Yasha off to this side, going this way. Nott, you're not too far from there. Molly, you were off to the opposite side to look to the other edge. Caleb, where were you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I was where Yasha was. I went over to look at her urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's right. So you were over by Yasha. Fjord, you were over by where you found the object. Frumpkin was-- ?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin would have been just 15 feet into the chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. And then Beau and Jester, where are you placed?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I would be probably be in between Fjord and Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was wherever those bodies where, because I was kneeling down and looking at them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. So that would be this relief right here, by Fjord's. All righty. And you watch as Molly-- actually Molly was making his way over there as this happened. And that one emerged.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It look like lightning corn on the cob.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Another one shifts out of the urn that you just had one emerge from.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's my own urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That Nott has destroyed. It dissipated, then the small motes (fwoosh) back into the urn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! It's like never ending.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Now that I know it's there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's not a surprise, at least.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Not a surprise.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, going for initiative here folks. 25 to 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh wow, all right. So we have Nott and Beau. All right, 20 to fifteen?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17. We got Fjord. All righty. 15 to ten?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jester and Yasha. All righty. Ten to five?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Rolled one, which makes me a two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I love it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The slithering stops. (booming) You watch as your eyes catch something shift above you. That large square pillar that was locked in the ceiling, that dome underneath it opened up and a strange, translucent, cube-like creature comes descending from the center. I need you guys all to roll initiative. (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Best you can look at it, it doesn't have any markings on it or anything unique, it's just a solid round knob end.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Like a lightning rod?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Something like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yasha, you're strong. Why don't you go try and twist the thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All right, I'll give it a try.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You spend a good two minutes shifting on the rod the opposite direction where it locks. No movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do we think we need to cast unique spells into those bowls for each of the three schools of magic? Which is what Jester said.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We heard you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (angrily) No, it's fine!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm trying to figure out, how do you cast necrotic damage on a bowl?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know, I could Inflict Wounds on it or something, or Toll the Dead on the bowl.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You want to Inflict Wounds on one of them?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well no, I'm going to use a cantrip because it's better. So I'm going to Toll the Dead on--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What is it? Evocation?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Necrotic, divination, and evocation. So I'll try to Toll the Dead on one of the bowls, the one that is sitting on the diamond.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You cast Toll the Dead. The dark arcane energy from Toll the Dead begins to gather around the hand of Jester, and as you release the spell you watch this burst of necrotic energy siphon back and immediately attach itself to the very top of this metallic rod. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's absorbed and there's a moment of pause before you feel (banging sound).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's do the other two.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, is it turning?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hear a shifting of stone-- this faint slithering sound begins to fill the chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Other two! Or maybe not.
